request_payload.exposure_text: Our civil defense systems are dangerously underfunded, and it's because of the same politicians who refuse to prioritize national security over partisan games. While other countries invest in protecting their citizens, we're left vulnerable because certain groups put their ideological agendas above our safety. It's time to demand better preparedness - our families deserve protection, not empty promises. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
